text.title: tracker-github-copilot-workspace Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tracker-github-copilot-workspace as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent emits all four artefacts in a single comment to "save round-trips".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defeats the per-gate edit point; reviewers cannot edit the spec without also seeing the diff, so they anchor on the diff and skip the cheap spec correction.

failure-mode.description: Snapshot URL placed inside an HTML comment so it does not render.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reviewers cannot click it; the audit trail is technically present but unusable, defeating the purpose of mandating the link.
